summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to the tentacle inventory bump surface so it can report jq, inventory, summary, output-parent, and trailer-marker readiness without rewriting INVENTORY.md.

proof.summary: 14/0 assertions: doctor advertises/emits tentacle-inventory-bump.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, doctor does not mutate fixture inventory, dry-run remains non-mutating, apply remains atomic, curated table and notes content remain byte-identical, idempotency still holds, and invalid inputs keep existing exit behavior.
Touched inventory bump shell surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Inventory regenerated; tentacle-inventory-bump.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic with score 500.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped tentacle inventory surface only.
